attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_HEADER_ID, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.AE_LINE_NUM, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.APPLICATION_ID, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.CURRENCY_CODE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATION_DATE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.CREATED_BY, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.ACCOUNTING_DATE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.LEDGER_ID, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_TRANSFER_MODE_CODE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_ID, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.DISPLAYED_LINE_NUMBER, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.BUSINESS_CLASS_CODE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_TABLE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.SOURCE_ID, 
replace(replace(replace(MF_XLA_AE_LINES.DESCRIPTION ,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' '),
MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 MF_XLA_AE_LINES
 where   
 MF_XLA_AE_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')-1
